message:
web: Remove repos route and link repo names to GitHub

Remove the separate /repos/$id route since filtering by repo is already
handled by the dropdown in the index page. Update the log detail view
to link repo names directly to GitHub for GitHub repos.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/u2d6kwta8l

files.patch:
@@ -1,108 +0,0 @@ -import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from "@/components/ui/avatar"; -import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; -import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; -import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card"; -import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table"; -import { createFileRoute, Link } from "@tanstack/react-router"; -import { getTranscriptsByRepo } from "../../../lib/server-functions"; - -type RepoTranscripts = Awaited>; - -export const Route = createFileRoute("/_app/app/repos/$id")({ - loader: ({ params }) => getTranscriptsByRepo({ data: params.id }), - component: RepoDetailComponent, -}); - -function RepoDetailComponent() { - const transcripts = Route.useLoaderData() as RepoTranscripts; - const { id } = Route.useParams(); - const formatSource = (source: RepoTranscripts[number]["source"]) => { - switch (source) { - case "claude-code": - return "Claude Code"; - case "codex": - return "Codex"; - default: - return "Unknown"; - } - }; - - return ( -
